title: orchis mascula subsp. speciosa
intro: Orchis mascula subsp. speciosa, also known as the Early Purple Orchid, is a subspecies of the green-flowered orchid, characterized by its distinctive green flowers with purple markings. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic effects. The Early Purple Orchid is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting kidney function. Herbal preparations involving Orchis mascula subsp. speciosa typically include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, often used to treat urinary tract infections, kidney stones, and other related conditions.
